# PHIL.171 ? Asymmetric Risk-Taking

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** risk_management
**Subcategory:** asymmetric_risk_taking
**Domain:** RISK_MANAGEMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Take risks with limited downside and unlimited upside

## Application
Seek convex payoffs, limit losses, preserve optionality, bet where you can't lose much but can win big

## Tags
philosophy, risk-management, asymmetric-risk-taking
